summary: Initial test suite generation for AstroLaunch Core Engine. All backend API tests (25) pass. Frontend E2E tests (33) all pass. Identified 1 genuine bug: onboarding upgrade screen (Step 7 / continue-free-btn) is unreachable due to a route guard redirect bug.

integration_issues.issue: Step 7 (Upgrade/continue-free-btn) is never rendered. In Onboarding.jsx, when handleNext is triggered at step 5 (partner), it calls updateUser({ onboarding_complete: true }) which immediately triggers the OnboardingRoute guard in App.js to redirect to /dashboard. This happens before setCurrentStep(7) can render the upgrade screen. The user correctly lands on dashboard (desired end state) but completely skips the upgrade/premium step.

action_items: BUG FIX NEEDED: In Onboarding.jsx, move updateUser({ onboarding_complete: true }) call to AFTER the upgrade step is shown (i.e., after the user clicks 'Continue Free'), or delay the OnboardingRoute redirect until the upgrade step is dismissed. Currently the upgrade screen (Step 7) is unreachable because the route guard redirects immediately when onboarding_complete=true is set in state.
seed_data_creation: Completed onboarding for pre-existing test user test@astro.com (birth_date: 1990-05-15, location: New York USA). Multiple test users created dynamically per run (TEST_User_*@testastro.com).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test suite is in /app/tests/e2e/ (4 spec files). Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_api.py. Baseline commit set. Pre-existing test user test@astro.com has onboarding completed. Main bug to fix: onboarding upgrade screen (continue-free-btn) is unreachable due to OnboardingRoute redirect - see action_items. After fix, add a test for the upgrade step visibility.
rca_of_issue: BUG: Unreachable Upgrade Step in Onboarding. Root Cause: In Onboarding.jsx handleNext(), when step 5 (partner) is submitted, the code calls updateUser({ onboarding_complete: true }) BEFORE showing the upgrade screen. The AuthContext.updateUser() immediately updates React state, which causes the OnboardingRoute wrapper in App.js (line 74: if (user.onboarding_complete) { return <Navigate to='/dashboard' replace />; }) to trigger a redirect to /dashboard. This happens synchronously before setCurrentStep(7) (the upgrade step) can render. Fix: Either (1) call updateUser({ onboarding_complete: true }) inside handleSkipToResults() when Continue Free is clicked, or (2) use a separate local state flag to control the route guard, updating it only after the upgrade step is dismissed.
